sentences.english: I always plan a big party with all my friends.
I don't like celebrating my birthday.
It just reminds me that I'm getting older.
sentences.korean: 나이 들고 있다는 걸 그냥 상기시켜줄 뿐이에요.

sentences.english: I prefer a quiet dinner with close friends rather than a big party, because it feels more personal and meaningful.
sentences.korean: 큰 파티보다 친한 친구들과 조용한 저녁을 선호해요. 더 개인적이고 의미 있게 느껴지거든요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
